ul.li: Add `path` to WebSocket Client constructor options object
Add note about multiple subprotocols using WebSocket Client options object `protocol` property
Add `statusText` argument to HTTP Client `onHeaders()` callback
Move HTML to Bibliography
Remove ResizableArrayBuffer and GrowableSharedArrayBuffer from Bibliography (now part of ECMA-262)
Fix markdown levels in Update module
Add BLE GATT and GAP Clients API
Add `headersMask` to HTTP Request
Add organization names to Normative references
UUID definition
Add security settings to BLE GATT Client
Add `add` and `remove` methods to UDP socket to support multicast
Remove `multicast` properties from UDP
Add `writeRead` to I2C (sync and async)
Add `activeLow` and `initialValue` to Digital
Rename BLE `security.lazy` to `security.immediate`
Add `eraseValue` and `writeAlign` to Flash
Add `dns` property and editorial changes to NTP Client
Clarifications on Display class pattern
Add DNS-SD Class Pattern
Add `configure()` and `configuration` to Image In
Add BLE Peripheral API
Add BLE and UUID normative references
Add note to Directory `status` about return value for non-existent paths
Add note that Directory `createLink` and `readLink` are optional.

emu-note.p: This change log is maintained for the convenience of reviewers and will not be incorporated into the Standard.
